description: Style Note Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wish-list this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Product Details Black wallet that has a press buttoned opening One main compartment with three card holders and two insert pockets in the middle One insert pocket on one side One transparent card holder on the left with a flap Six card holders and one insert pocket on the other side of the flap Stitch detailing with a pleated look and graphic print on the front One zipped pocket at the back with branding Material and Care Synthetic Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt Size 12 cm x 10.5 cm
